globalRules.turnCycleDefinition: One full round back to the same player; starts at the beginning of a player's turn.
globalRules.durationExpirationDefault: Beginning of the start player's turn after the specified turn cycles complete.
alchemyNotes: Promo cards are isolated in their own source pack so future promo uploads can be added without touching Gen 1/2/3 base source files.
Modifier is separate from Atk. Modifier adds to both Hit Roll and Attack Damage Roll.
Atk adds only to Attack Damage Roll.
Field detection is separated from Magic Type. Magic Type is Standard/Infinite/Lightning; Magic Subtype is None/Equip/Field.
